ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_types" (
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing type */,
  "clothing_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing type */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the clothing type belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the clothing type is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the size belongs */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type this measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_name" TEXT /* Name of the measurement (e.g., length, shoulder, chest, sleeve length) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the measurement */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement (e.g., cm, inches) */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the measurement is required for the clothing type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "size_measurements" (
  "size_measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size measurement */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type this size measurement belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size this measurement belongs to */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement this size measurement belongs to */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the measurement for the given size */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the size measurement is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES measurements ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_size_measurements_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "clothing_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing type this product belongs to */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size this product belongs to */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the product belongs */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL of the product image */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the product is active in the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_clothing_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("clothing_type_id") REFERENCES clothing_types ("clothing_type_id")
)
